# Contributors

Thank you to all the people who have contributed to the Language Exchange Platform! 🎉

## Core Team

### Group 17 INSA Team
The original creators and maintainers of this project.

## Contributors

<!-- This list is automatically generated. Please don't edit it manually. -->
<!-- Add contributors using: git log --format='%aN <%aE>' | sort -u -->

We welcome contributions from everyone! See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidelines.

## How to Contribute

1. Fork the repository
2. Create your feature branch
3. Commit your changes
4. Push to the branch
5. Open a Pull Request

## Recognition

Contributors are recognized in the following ways:

- Listed in this CONTRIBUTORS.md file
- Mentioned in release notes
- Acknowledged in the project README
- Featured in our community highlights

## Types of Contributions

We value all types of contributions:

- 💻 **Code** - Bug fixes, features, refactoring
- 📝 **Documentation** - README, guides, tutorials
- 🎨 **Design** - UI/UX improvements, graphics
- 🐛 **Bug Reports** - Identifying and reporting issues
- 💡 **Ideas** - Feature suggestions and feedback
- 🌍 **Translation** - Internationalization support
- 📢 **Community** - Helping others, spreading the word
- ✅ **Testing** - QA, test coverage, bug verification

## Special Thanks

Special thanks to:

- **Stream.io** - For providing excellent chat and video SDKs
- **MongoDB** - For the robust database solution
- **React Team** - For the amazing frontend framework
- **Open Source Community** - For inspiration and support

---

Want to see your name here? Check out our [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)!
